chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.S- 1668 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For Katcha Peshi. 3. For hearing of MA 14613/16 19.12.2016. Mrs. Razia Ali Zaman Khan Patoli, Advocate for petitioners. Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro, A.A.G alongwith SIP Asghar Khan SHO P.S Rajo Khanani. Mr. Mazhar Ali Laghari, Advocate for respondents No.4 to 6. -.-.-. Learned Counsel for petitioners submits that since FIR has been disposed of in ‘C’ (Cancelled) class, therefore, she does not press this petition any further, but requests that police officials should conduct themselves strictly in accordance with law. This petition is dismissed as not pressed alongwith listed application but with an observation that it goes without saying that police officials shall conduct themselves strictly in accordance with law. JUDGE Ali Haider
